name: Chakram of Destiny
description:
Carve the Fate Crone's runes to create spinning mystical discs and generate Crux. Discs surround you or up to 4 allies in front of you, granting a shield that absorbs 3068 damage for 6 seconds. 

Recasting on a target already shielded grants a new shield that is 30% stronger.

Discs prefer your reticle target, or low-Health targets without shields.
